title: Advisory Issue
description: UI advisory issue: info/warn/critical. Books ship by default; only legal/compliance blocks. Manual pause available in UI.

issue_id.description: Unique id for this issue (e.g. UUID or source:plan_id:hash)

severity.description: info=watch, warn=review soon, critical=manual decision required

source.description: Origin: metadata_similarity, wave_diversity, anti_homogeneity, engagement, etc.

nearest_neighbors.description: For similarity: list of { book_id, similarity_score }
